name: stripe-get-customer
description: Retrieve a Stripe customer by ID, including their subscription status and billing details. Use after stripe-create-customer or from a Stripe webhook to check subscription tier, livemode, and balance. Set EXPAND_SUBSCRIPTIONS=true to include active subscription details for condition branching.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Stripe secret key (e.g. 'stripe/secret_key').

CUSTOMER_ID.description: Stripe customer ID (e.g. 'cus_xxx'). Supports {{customer_id}} template interpolation.

EXPAND_SUBSCRIPTIONS.description: When true, expands the subscriptions list inline. Adds subscription status, current_period_end, and plan details to the output.

setup_instructions.title: Typical workflow pattern
setup_instructions.detail: Chain: [Stripe webhook: customer.subscription.updated] → [stripe-get-customer: CUSTOMER_ID={{customer_id}}, EXPAND_SUBSCRIPTIONS=true] → [condition: subscription_status == 'active'] → downstream actions.
